Legal

Cookie Policy

Last updated: May 18, 2025

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and understand how you use them.

Cookies We Use

1. Essential cookies

These cookies are necessary for the Site to function. They cannot be disabled.

Cookie Purpose Duration
Session cookie Maintains your session while browsing Session

2. Analytics cookies

We use Google Analytics 4 to understand how visitors interact with our Site. All data is anonymised.

Cookie Purpose Duration
_ga Distinguishes users 2 years
_ga_* Maintains session state 2 years
_gid Distinguishes users 24 hours

You can opt out of Google Analytics at: tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout

3. Affiliate cookies

When you click an affiliate link on our Site, the destination website may set its own cookies to track your visit for commission purposes. These are governed by the third party's privacy policy.

How to Control Cookies

You can control or delete cookies at any time:

  • Chrome: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies
  • Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
  • Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
  • Edge: Settings → Privacy, Search and Services → Cookies

Note: disabling analytics cookies will not prevent the Site from working normally.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Cookie Policy. Changes will be posted on this page with a revised date.

Contact

Email: privacy@aitoolsidea.com
